{{Quote|Nada Synnt (oh, ''please'', Trooper …) has been keeping his operatives away, but this must have changed with Tion's death, since Danken and a couple of others are definitely drifting in that direction.|[[Cynabar's InfoNet]]|<ref name="GNN3" />}}
'''Danken''' worked for the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Nada Synnt]]'s [[Nada Synnt's organization|organization]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Danken and several others were headed to [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] in an attempt to run the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Blockade of Ralltiir|blockade]] in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] to take advantage of the increased need for personal expendables, luxury foodstuffs, survival equipment and weapons.

==Appearances==
